name: io.github.bch1212/agentfetch
description: Fetch any web URL and get clean, token-budgeted, cached Markdown. Built for AI agents — auto-routes between Trafilatura, Jina, FireCrawl, and PDF extractors. One MCP tool, every URL type.

environment_variables.name: JINA_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Jina Reader API key. Free tier covers ~1M tokens/mo at jina.ai/reader.

environment_variables.name: FIRECRAWL_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: FireCrawl API key for JS-rendered pages. 500 free credits at firecrawl.dev. Optional.

environment_variables.name: REDIS_URL
environment_variables.description: Redis connection URL for response caching. Optional.
